name: metabolic weight + j/d chicken flavor dry dog food
description: just like the human obesity epidemic, over 55% of the pet population is overweight. even a little extra weight can impact the pet's quality of life and relationship with family because that extra weight can reduce play time, impact mobility and affect the lifelong general health of your dog. activates pet's metabolism for easy and effective weight loss enriched with omega-3 fatty acids, glucosamine & chondroitin sulfate stimulate dog's natural ability to burn fat
